headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win. The Detroit Tigers also secured a close victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, while the Cincinnati Reds rallied past the Cleveland Guardians 7-6.

Injuries and availability impact are affecting several teams. Max Fried, a left-handed pitcher for the New York Yankees, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left elbow bone bruise. Additionally, the Kansas City Royals' Matt Strahm has been placed on the 15-day injured list with right knee inflammation.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Oakland Athletics acquired 2B Alika Williams in a trade with the Pittsburgh Pirates, sending RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pirates. The Athletics also traded RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash and acquired LHP José Suarez from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2 in a closely contested matchup. Zack Littell earned the win for the Nationals, tossing 5.0 innings with 3 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested matchup. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays at the plate with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Reds Rally Past Guardians 7-6**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Cleveland Guardians in a close matchup, securing a 7-6 victory. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place Max Fried on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Max Fried, a left-handed pitcher for the New York Yankees, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left elbow bone bruise. The move is retroactive to May 14, 2026.

top_news.title: **Athletics Acquire 2B Alika Williams in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics have traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates in exchange for 2B Alika Williams.
